commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor real-environment proof plus a maintainer decision on the trust-boundary change and issue-closing scope.; Cleared: No concrete security defect remains in the latest diff because the new trust path uses the existing official ClawHub URL authority check; the boundary change still needs maintainer-visible proof. (sha=ceef06ed8cb6d7e5dfcd014db9ed56c72082cc46)
commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens `trustedOfficialInstall` classification for official ClawHub install records whose package matches an npm-only official catalog entry, adds registry tests, and adds a local repro script.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +127, Other +225. Total +366 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main requires `clawhubSpec` for ClawHub official trust, while Microsoft Teams is an npm-only official catalog entry and untrusted non-bundled channels fail at the keyed-state gate. This review did not run a live ClawHub/Microsoft Teams deployment.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor real-environment proof plus a maintainer decision on the trust-boundary change and issue-closing scope.

target.title: fix: trust all ClawHub channel types when package matches official catalog
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes issue #92516: ClawHub official-channel installs for npm-only catalog entries (like Microsoft Teams) were not trusted.

## Real behavior proof
## Real behavior proof


**Behavior addressed**: ClawHub official-channel installs should be trusted when the package matches the official catalog, regardless of whether the entry has clawhubSpec or npmSpec.

**Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw setup with Node.js 24

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
$ node --import tsx scripts/repro/issue-92516-clawhub-trust.mts
```

**Evidence after fix**:
```
=== Reproduction for issue #92516 ===
Testing ClawHub official-channel install for npm-only catalog entry (msteams)...
✓ npm-only ClawHub official install trusted

Testing that ClawHub community channel is NOT trusted...
✓ Community channel correctly NOT trusted

Testing that ClawHub private channel is NOT trusted...
✓ Private channel correctly NOT trusted

PASS: ClawHub official-channel installs are trusted for npm-only catalog entries.
```

**Observed result after fix**: npm-only ClawHub official-channel installs (like Microsoft Teams) are now trusted, while community/private channels correctly remain untrusted.

**What was not tested**: Production self-hosted deployments with actual Microsoft Teams channel.

## Changes

- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.ts**: Trust ClawHub official-channel installs for npm-only catalog entries
- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.test.ts**: Added test coverage
- **scripts/repro/issue-92516-clawhub-trust.mts**: Updated reproduction script

Fixes #92516
target.author: wangmiao0668000666
